privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are accurate. The task creates a synthetic Android project called 'WeatherApp' with Groovy DSL build scripts using real versions: Android Gradle Plugin 8.2.0 (released November 2023), Kotlin 1.9.0 (released July 2023), compileSdk 34 (Android 14), and minSdk 24 (Android 7.0). The application ID is com.example.weatherapp. The task requires converting three Groovy DSL files (settings.gradle, build.gradle, app/build.gradle) to Kotlin DSL format (.gradle.kts) and removing the original Groovy files. The project location is /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/WeatherApp.
